report:
Brand-new competitor - zero prior BattleBots record; treat every rating as provisional.
The official Pro League page singles Manta out in its Group A teaser ("Manta gets it...").
A roster-reveal reaction video runs the title "Group A Just Got Dangerous" - Manta is the one "stealing the spotlight".
BattleBots' own builder poll (all 24 teams asked who wins the league) lists Manta as "one to watch".
Fandom notes the team utilizes their spare/parallel build experience for the Pro League entry.
Fan predictions on r/battlebots have Group A "between Skorpios and Manta - manta will slightly win the match".
Multiple fan pick-lists (e.g. "Manta - Madcatter - Copperhead - End Game") put Manta as a group winner.
This week: faces Skorpios, the group's veteran, in the episode-102 opener.
Hype level is high for a debut bot; no fight footage exists yet to verify it.
No damage or reliability intel found - nothing has been broken on camera yet.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
